name: The Fabled Nozoochee

desc: During your Main Phase: You can discard 1 "Fabled" monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. When this card is Special Summoned this way: You can Special Summon 1 Level 2 or lower "Fabled" monster from your hand.
